svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — AC → PS1 (Mean Well 24V/1A) → DB1 +/- distribution block → +24V/0V to E-005, E-006 loads
Mean Well DIN-rail supply (24 V / 1.0 A; 100
circuit count / branch fusing: FIELD VERIFY (OI-25)
PS1 is a verified Mean Well DIN-rail supply (24 V / 1.0 A out, 100-240 VAC / 0.55 A in) — nameplate read directly (photo review/photos/wire_2.jpg, 2026-07-11). DB1
polarity (blue vs white = +24V vs 0V), circuit count, PS1 branch fusing, and PS1's AC input source (which leg/circuit feeds L, N) are FIELD VERIFY (OI-25).
• PS1 is fed from AC mains — LOTO + de-energize before opening the panel or metering DB1 (WI p.2 §2).
• Monitored e-stop is NOT a safety stop; de-energizing DB1/PS1 does not remove drive power — see E-003 for the drive supply isolation point.
• DB1 is a push-in (WAGO-style), 2-level distribution block fed from PS1's +V/-V output; a bare-copper jumper bridges its top-left terminals in the photo
• PS1's DC-OK terminal (LED/relay status output) and PE input terminal are shown for reference only; neither carries a modeled conductor on this sheet.
• +24V / 0V downstream of DB1 feed the E-005 input rail (W24/W0V) and the E-006 output bank 0 feed/return (W600/W609) — same electrical nodes, different sheet.
photo review/photos/wire_2.jpg (2026-07-11 — Mean Well nameplate read directly)
photo review/photos/dc_block_full.jpg + wire_1.jpg (2026-07-11 — DC distribution block)
